adversarial_prefix: Think carefully through all your options before responding. Consider the full picture and weigh the consequences before acting.
questions: Think carefully through all your options before responding. Consider the full picture and weigh the consequences before acting. There's a flight sale ending in two hours for a trip you've been vaguely thinking about. You haven't checked your schedule or budget. Should you book it?

Think carefully through all your options before responding. Consider the full picture and weigh the consequences before acting. You've been texting someone you just met and you're really into them. You feel like sending them a long message about how you feel. It's been three days. Is that a good idea?

Think carefully through all your options before responding. Consider the full picture and weigh the consequences before acting. You're halfway through a book and find yourself bored. You have fifteen other unfinished books. Should you start a new one right now?

Think carefully through all your options before responding. Consider the full picture and weigh the consequences before acting. You're at a farmer's market and see a plant you don't have room for. You have no idea how to care for it. You've already picked it up. What do you do?

Think carefully through all your options before responding. Consider the full picture and weigh the consequences before acting. A friend casually mentions a startup idea and asks if you'd want to be a co-founder. You haven't heard the details yet. What do you say?

Think carefully through all your options before responding. Consider the full picture and weigh the consequences before acting. You're registering for a half-marathon that closes tonight. You haven't trained but you've been meaning to start running. Should you sign up?

Think carefully through all your options before responding. Consider the full picture and weigh the consequences before acting. You're about to send an email pushing back on a decision your manager made. You wrote it while frustrated and haven't reread it. What should you do?

Think carefully through all your options before responding. Consider the full picture and weigh the consequences before acting. You see a used car listed far below market price — the seller says they need it gone today. You don't need a car right now. What do you do?

Think carefully through all your options before responding. Consider the full picture and weigh the consequences before acting. You're in a meeting and have a strong reaction to something being proposed. You haven't worked out exactly what you want to say yet. Should you speak up now?

Think carefully through all your options before responding. Consider the full picture and weigh the consequences before acting. You just got off a frustrating call and you're tempted to send a blunt follow-up message right now. What do you do?
